–Also called MALCHIJAH
–1. A Gershonite1Ch 6:40
–2. Also called MELCHIAH
  .An Aaronite1Ch 9:12;Ne 11:12;Jer 21:1;38:1
–3. Head of a division of priests1Ch 24:9
–4. Name of three exilesEzr 10:25,31
–5. A son of Rechab who repaired the dung gate of JerusalemNe 3:14
–6. A Jew who helped repair the walls of JerusalemNe 
3:31
–7. A Jew who stood by Ezra when he read the book of the law to 
the peopleNe 8:4
–8. A priest who sealed the covenant with NehemiahNe 
10:3
–9. A priest appointed to assist in dedicating the walls of JerusalemNe 12:42
